zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilles de Beaumetz於1200年出生在法國時，他的父親Gilles I de Beaumetz30歲，母親Agnès de Coucy26歲。他和Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1264年享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gilles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilles de Beaumetz was born in 1200, in France, his father, Gilles I de Beaumetz, was 30 and his mother, Agnès de Coucy, was 26. He had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes. He died in 1264, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilles de Beaumetz est né en 1200, à France, son père, Gilles I de Beaumetz, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Coucy, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes. Il est décédé en 1264, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Fran: Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Gilles de Beaumetz 1200 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilles I de Beaumetz 30 und seine Mutter Agnès de Coucy 26. Er hatte mit Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1264 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilles de Beaumetz è nato il nel 1200 nel Francia, il suo padre, Gilles I de Beaumetz, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Coucy, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes. Morì nel 1264, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilles de Beaumetzが1200年にフランスで生まれた時，父Gilles I de Beaumetzは30歳，母Agnès de Coucyは26歳であった。彼はJeanne de Condé-de Morialmesとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1264年に64歳で死去した。

ko.Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Fran: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 부르그스
ko.lifeSummary: Gilles de Beaumetz(이)가 1200년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilles I de Beaumetz(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Coucy(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Fran: бургесь, чир, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilles de Beaumetz родился в 1200 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Gilles I de Beaumetz было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Coucy, 26. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Jeanne de Condé-de Morialmes. Он умер в 1264 г. в возрасте 64 лет.
